hero.headline: The Most Advanced Access Platform
hero.subHeadline: Explore how GateFlow integrates military-grade cryptographic security with an elegant, lightning-fast user experience to transform physical gated entry.

scanner.title: Native Mobile Scanner
scanner.description: Process QR codes in under 100ms. Optimized for low-end tablets and smartphones used by security staff.

hmac.title: Signed QR Logic
hmac.description: Prevent ticket duplication and fakes. All codes are cryptographically signed with HMAC-SHA256.

offline.title: Offline Sync Queue
offline.description: Internet down? No problem. All scans are queued locally and synced automatically when connection restores.

hardware.title: Hardware Agnostic
hardware.description: Use any Android or iOS device. No need for expensive, proprietary gate hardware.

audit.title: Live Audit Log
audit.description: Full visibility of all entries, denials, and guest details in a real-time dashboard.

api.title: Developer API
api.description: Connect GateFlow to your proprietary resident apps or booking systems with ease.

deepDives.title: Built with modern tech for 24/7 reliability

edge.title: Edge Processing
edge.description: Verification happens locally on the device, ensuring zero lag at the gate.

cloud.title: Cloud Native
cloud.description: Built on scalable infrastructure to handle thousands of concurrent scans.

region.title: Region Optimized
region.description: Data residency options for Egypt and the Gulf to meet compliance.

security.title: Built for Absolute Security
security.description: We don’t compromise on trust. GateFlow utilizes industry-standard encryption, rate-limiting, and Zero-Trust methodologies across the stack.

cta.headline: Ready to see it in action?
